name: Wellock- The town of the bizarre
description:
Welcome to Wellock! Founded in West Virginia in 1807 as a coal mining haven, this town is notorious for the strange happenings that have occurred here. You have just moved in, unaware of these occurrences.

(Character image was generated with a site called Nightcafe. If you recognize aspects of your art used in the image, please let me know so I can give you proper credit. I only say this because generative AI has a bad habit of mish-mashing works of other artist's work together to make one image.)
creator: firefoxsly20
